criteria.text: When an unauthenticated user requests any page, the system shall redirect to sign-in.
When a user lacking Permissions.UserAdmin opens /admin/users, the system shall render the access-denied state.
When a document is uploaded, the custom Document Intelligence model shall extract issuer fields at >=0.8 confidence.
criteria.disposition: Blocked on client-supplied labelled sample set (open item O8); prebuilt-model fallback shipped and evidenced under AUTH-C2 pattern; revisit at phase exit.
